info.description: Backend API over canonical Metagraphed registry artifacts for Bittensor subnet interfaces.
info.title: Metagraphed API

200.description: Canonical artifact wrapped in the Metagraphed API envelope.

304.description: ETag matched and the cached response is still valid.

404.description: Artifact or API route was not found.
